display_text: Tango (Shared), Cost: 30: Core early-game lane consumable for trading and sustain. Provides continuous health regeneration after consuming a nearby tree, offsetting harass damage. Single charge and low cost make it a staple purchase for almost all heroes during the laning phase to maintain lane presence.

display_text: Tango (Shared), Cost: 30: Utilize near Ironwood Trees for maximum efficiency, doubling heal duration from 16 to 32 seconds.
